caption: In a room with wood-paneled walls and horizontal blinds, a man stands at a podium speaking into a microphone. He is wearing glasses, a white shirt, and a dark vest with a red and white decorative trim. A small audience is seated in front of him, seen from behind; they are dressed in casual attire, including sweaters and jackets in shades of maroon, yellow, and navy blue. To the man's right, another individual is partially visible behind a desk. A white logo with the text "ORCA" is visible in the lower right corner of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man continues to speak and gesture with his hands, and the camera slightly adjusts its angle, moving from a medium shot to a closer view of the speaker and the audience.
